2603.09109.title: VIVID-Med: LLM-Supervised Structured Pretraining for Deployable Medical ViTs
2603.09109.paper_summary: Vision-language pretraining has driven significant progress in medical image analysis. However, current methods typically supervise visual encoders using one-hot labels or free-form text, neither of which effectively captures the complex semantic relationships among clinical findings. In this study, we introduce VIVID-Med, a novel framework that leverages a frozen large language model (LLM) as a structured semantic teacher to pretrain medical vision transformers (ViTs). VIVID-Med translates clinical findings into verifiable JSON field-state pairs via a Unified Medical Schema (UMS), utilizing answerability-aware masking to focus optimization. It then employs Structured Prediction Decomposition (SPD) to partition cross-attention into orthogonality-regularized query groups, extracting complementary visual aspects. Crucially, the LLM is discarded post-training, yielding a lightweight, deployable ViT-only backbone. We evaluated VIVID-Med across multiple settings: on CheXpert linear probing, it achieves a macro-AUC of 0.8588, outperforming BiomedCLIP by +6.65 points while using 500x less data. It also demonstrates robust zero-shot cross-domain transfer to NIH ChestX-ray14 (0.7225 macro-AUC) and strong cross-modality generalization to CT, achieving 0.8413 AUC on LIDC-IDRI lung nodule classification and 0.9969 macro-AUC on OrganAMNIST 11-organ classification. VIVID-Med offers a highly efficient, scalable alternative to deploying resource-heavy vision-language models in clinical settings.
2603.09109.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言預訓練在醫學影像分析中推動了顯著的進展。<lb/>然而，目前的方法通常使用一熱標籤或自由形式的文本來監督視覺編碼器，這兩者都無法有效捕捉臨床發現之間複雜的語義關係。<lb/>在這項研究中，我們介紹了 VIVID-Med，一個新穎的框架，利用凍結的大型語言模型（LLM）作為結構化語義教師來預訓練醫學視覺Transformer（ViTs）。<lb/>VIVID-Med 通過統一醫學架構（UMS）將臨床發現轉換為可驗證的 JSON 字段狀態對，利用可回答性意識的遮罩來集中優化。<lb/>然後，它採用結構化預測分解（SPD）將交叉注意力劃分為正交正則化的查詢組，提取互補的視覺方面。<lb/>關鍵是，LLM 在訓練後被丟棄，產生輕量級、可部署的僅 ViT 主幹。<lb/>我們在多個設置中評估了 VIVID-Med：在 CheXpert 線性探測中，它達到了 0.8588 的宏觀 AUC，超越了 BiomedCLIP 6.65 分，同時使用的數據量少了 500 倍。<lb/>它還顯示出對 NIH ChestX-ray14 的強健零樣本跨域轉移（0.7225 宏觀 AUC）以及對 CT 的強大跨模態泛化，在 LIDC-IDRI 肺結節分類中達到 0.8413 AUC，並在 OrganAMNIST 11 組織分類中達到 0.9969 宏觀 AUC。<lb/>VIVID-Med 提供了一種高效、可擴展的替代方案，以在臨床環境中部署資源密集型的視覺-語言模型。
2603.09109.author: Xiyao Wang et.al.
2603.09109.authors: Xiyao Wang, Xiaoyu Tan, Yang Dai, Yuxuan Fu, Shuo Li, Xihe Qiu
